data.name: 四叶派对
data.detailed_description:
Game Instructions:

This game contains some AI-generated art modifications. If you have any objections, please purchase with caution!

There was once a handsome and extraordinary man, accompanied by five wives of breathtaking beauty. The family spent every day together, living a warm, harmonious and blissful life.

However, one day, the peaceful life was suddenly disrupted - a snake demon that had cultivated for a thousand years came uninvited. It brutally abducted the five wives and imprisoned them in the deep mountains, and even more maliciously sealed all their memories of the past.

Time flies, and before long, it was the hot summer of the Dragon Boat Festival. It is said that on this day, the yang energy is at its peak, and it is the time when the power of the snake demon is greatly weakened. In order to rescue his beloved wife and break the curse, the man resolutely shouldered his backpack and set off on a perilous journey to save her.

Due to the special nature of the game, players who wish to have a complete gaming experience are requested to visit the game's community center, add the Steam group of this game and claim the strategy guide there.

In "Four-Leaf Party", it is a game that integrates multiple game forms and methods.

In the combat gameplay of this game, players will transform into the head of a snake and embark on a unique adventure. In each round of battle, friendly units will appear one after another. Players only need to gently touch them, and these allies will immediately join the team. Just like the classic Snake game, the team will grow longer as members increase. Moreover, each teammate has a unique skill. Even better, all the allies that appear are randomly generated, which means that the team players assemble each time is unique, and every battle brings a brand-new experience.

In addition, during their leisure time outside of battles, players can unlock some skills. These skills are like the icing on the cake, endowing players with additional powerful abilities, adding more support to battles and making the path to victory smoother.

Finally, players can unlock various talents. These talents act as a solid backing, providing numerous benefits to both the player and their teammates, such as increased damage, automatic health regeneration, and shield generation, etc., helping players continuously grow stronger and reach new heights on their journey of growth.

This is no longer a simple game of eating food to grow longer, but a challenging and heartwarming journey.

In the storyline gameplay of this game, players need to transform into meticulous detectives, carefully observing and listening, collecting information from every conversation, and gradually piecing together the fragmented memories of their wives. Then, in the intricate dream-like recollections, they must find those lost wives.

Game Features

Break through the traditional training system and refuse to mindlessly repeat tasks just to unlock intimacy.

Integrate into the role system in various situations and let your little quirks be fulfilled.

Return to the essence and reduce the unnecessary drama.

data.short_description: This is an adventure game set in a fantasy world without the concept of time. It tells the story of what happens after the player rescues his wife from monsters.
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文*, 英文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 MB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: All materials are original Fu Moling, forbidden to unpack, unpack, or any other infringement.
